evidence.claim_boundary: Benchmark compares identity-lane string construction vs legacy narrative replay in Rust.

protocol.alternative_hypothesis: Hard-anchor construction omits heavy narrative payloads and keeps a large speedup over legacy replay.
protocol.null_hypothesis: Hard-anchor context construction has no meaningful speed or size advantage over legacy narrative replay.
